title: sorghum laterale
intro: Sorghum laterale, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of sorghum laterale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of sorghum laterale can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
